seoTitle: Claremont Meadows vs Clarence Town — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Claremont Meadows and Clarence Town. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Claremont Meadows vs Clarence Town: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Claremont Meadows and Clarence Town.
heading: Claremont Meadows vs Clarence Town — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Claremont Meadows, New South Wales and Clarence Town, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Claremont Meadows has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Clarence Town (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Claremont Meadows or Clarence Town safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Claremont Meadows has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Clarence Town scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Claremont Meadows scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Clarence Town scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Claremont Meadows or Clarence Town?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Claremont Meadows has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
